Container.Name: Knitting Library
Container.Overview: Self-hosted knitting pattern manager with PDF/image uploads, searchable pattern library, annotations, project tracking, and yarn inventory.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: HTTP port for the Knitting Library web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent app data, including the SQLite database, uploaded patterns, thumbnails, yarn images, annotations, and settings.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID used for files written to /data and /logs. Unraid default is 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID used for files written to /data and /logs. Unraid default is 100.

Config.Name: Trusted Proxies
Config.Description: Comma-separated proxy IPs or CIDRs whose X-Forwarded-For and X-Forwarded-Proto headers should be trusted. Leave blank when accessing the app directly.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated allowed browser origins for CORS. Leave blank for same-origin access.
